books.title: Seven Brief Lessons on Physics
books.author: Carlo Rovelli
books.description: A concise and elegant introduction to modern physics, covering relativity, quantum mechanics, and the nature of the universe in simple language.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A novel set in the Jazz Age that explores themes of wealth, love, and the American Dream.

books.title: A Brief History of Time
books.author: Stephen Hawking
books.description: A groundbreaking book that explains complex cosmological concepts like black holes, time, and the origin of the universe for general readers.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
books.description: A must-read for developers, offering practical advice on writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code.

books.title: The Elegant Universe
books.author: Brian Greene
books.description: An accessible guide to string theory and the quest to unify all physical laws into a single framework.

books.title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
books.author: Harold Abelson, Gerald Jay Sussman
books.description: A classic computer science book that teaches fundamental programming concepts and abstraction techniques.

books.title: Eloquent JavaScript
books.author: Marijn Haverbeke
books.description: A modern introduction to JavaScript programming, covering basic to advanced concepts with practical examples.

books.title: Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras & TensorFlow
books.author: Aurelien Geron
books.description: A practical guide to machine learning using popular Python libraries, with hands-on examples and real-world applications.

books.title: The Merchant of Venice
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.description: A classic Shakespearean play exploring themes of justice, mercy, and human relationships.

books.title: The Happy Prince and Other Tales
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.description: A collection of touching short stories that explore kindness, sacrifice, and human compassion.

books.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.description: A series of detective stories featuring Sherlock Holmes solving intriguing mysteries with logic and observation.

books.title: The Gene: An Intimate History
books.author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
books.description: A detailed exploration of the history of genetics, explaining how genes shape our identity and the ethical implications of genetic science.
